chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-5232 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 26.02.2026. Mr. Tariq Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, D.A.G. --------------- The grievance of the Petitioner is that an Appeal dated 11.09.2023 filed before the Respondent No.2 under Rule 116 of the Explosives Rules, 2010 impugning the cancellation of an explosives license is not being decided. The Petitioner essentially seeks a decision on such Appeal. Under the circumstances, the Petition is disposed of with the directions to Respondent No.2 to decide the aforementioned appeal, if pending, through speaking Order after hearing the Petitioner and all concerned without further delay, preferably within a period of 45 days from today. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to the Respondent No.2 for purpose of compliance. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
